verses.text: Topa aw, hong huh in; bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte lak panin mi thumante maimang ta a, mipha khat zong om nawnlo hi
Mi kim in a vengte kiangah zuauthu gen ciat a, phat khemna kam zol leh lungsim nam nih tawh thu a gen uh hi
“I Leii tawh gualzo ding, i mukte eima neihsa; i to kua hiam?” a ci vial, kiphatsakna a piangsak leii, phat khemna muk khempeuh, Topa in atkhia ta hen
Topa in, “Mizawngte a neihsa kihawkkhia a, mi cimawhte thumin tau uh ahih ciangin tu-in dingin, amau' lunggulh, lungmuan'na munah amaute ka koih ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa' thuciamnate, a siangtho thuciamna hi a, meikhuk sungah sagihvei a kisiangsak ngun tawh kibang hi
Topa aw, kote hong dal in la, tukhang mite kiang panin kote hong kem in
Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte lakah siatna kipahtawi a, mun khempeuhah migilote kidimin vak kawikawi uh hi.
